primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: The lysates from HuCCT1 shK18 stable cell line transfected with FLAG-K18-WT or FLAG-K18-S30A were captured with anti-FLAG beads, and then subjected to in-gel trypsin digestion and LC-MS/MS analysis.
the fold change from three independent replicates of the interacting proteins with K18 in FLAG-K18WT cells was calculated relative to FLAG-K18S30A cells.

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between disease and matched control cohorts.
evidence: proteins with 23 up-regulated (fold change >1.50, P < 0.05) and 36 down-regulated (fold change <0.67, P < 0.05) O-GlcNAc sites in HuCCT1 cells were successfully enriched using Click-iG
The lysates extracted from HuCCT1 and HIBEpiC cells were incubated with 500 μM premixed CuSO4/BTTAA... subjected to LC–MS/MS analysis.

attributes.route_or_context: transfected into HuCCT1 shK18 stable cell line
evidence: The lysates from HuCCT1 shK18 stable cell line transfected with FLAG-K18-WT or FLAG-K18-S30A were captured with anti-FLAG beads

attributes.route_or_context: metabolic incorporation in HuCCT1 and HIBEpiC cells
evidence: HuCCT1 and HIBEpiC cells incubated with 200 μM 1,6-Pr2GalNAz for 48 h were established as the standardized condition for glycoproteomic analysis.

replicate_hints: three independent replicates of HuCCT1 and HIBEpiC cells
three independent replicates of the interacting proteins with K18 in FLAG-K18WT cells was calculated relative to FLAG-K18S30A cells

evidence: proteins with 23 up-regulated... and 36 down-regulated... O-GlcNAc sites in HuCCT1 cells were successfully enriched using Click-iG
the fold change from three independent replicates of the interacting proteins with K18 in FLAG-K18WT cells was calculated relative to FLAG-K18S30A cells

quantification_strategy: fold change from three independent replicates

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment uses data-dependent acquisition (DDA) with HCD fragmentation and label-free quantification (LFQ) based on spectral abundance (SAF) or fold-change of replicates.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study specifically targets O-GlcNAcylation using the Click-iG strategy, metabolic oligosaccharide engineering (1,6-Pr2GalNAz), and specialized search engines (pGlyco3) for intact glycopeptides.
